key_insight: A half-mode CSRR-based SIW can cut transverse size by nearly 50% while preserving the dominant-mode propagation behavior of the full uniplanar CSRR SIW.
engineering_relevance: This offers a simpler, more compact waveguide platform for planar microwave components where reduced footprint and fabrication simplicity matter.
method: Solved a FEM eigenvalue problem for the complex propagation constant of supported modes.
Computed dispersion diagrams of the dominant mode.
Included all loss mechanisms in the modal analysis.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports dispersion-diagram results from FEM eigenmode analysis showing that the half-mode structure retains the performance of the existing full CSRR SIW.
watch_item: Results are based on eigenmode/dispersion analysis, so practical fabrication tolerances and measurement validation may still be needed before deployment.
paper_title: Eigenmode analysis of a half-mode uniplanar metamaterial-inspired substrate integrated waveguide
